ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "fix_version" TEXT /* Version of the fix, if applicable */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for the issue */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component or module affected by the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., bug, feature, task) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue, if fixed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who updated the issue */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Additional labels for the issue (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* Paths to file attachments related to the issue */,
  "vcs_changeset" TEXT /* Link to specific version control changesets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component or module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who updated the component */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, QA engineer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the issue */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, in progress, completed) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who updated the assignment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Paths to file attachments related to the comment */,
  "mentioned_users" TEXT /* List of user IDs mentioned in the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who updated the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who updated the project */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
